publishDecision.summary: The lead is usable, but it needs verification or tightening before it becomes the main post.
leadStrengths: The story is recent enough to stay usable today.
The story has multiple AI-specific signals, not just one loose keyword.
business move stories are easier to explain clearly than broad industry-shift headlines.
leadRisks: SaaStr is not on the trusted-source list, so the lead needs stronger verification.
backupStrengths: Reuters is treated as a trusted source for the morning stack.
The headline has enough AI-specific signal to support strong downstream content.
backupRisks: The story is aging out of the ideal morning-news window.
The story still reads like a broad industry shift, which can lead to vague content if not tightened.
